old_value: {"id":"gt-4cr","title":"Move Mayor banner into header nav on desktop, collapse to content area on mobile","description":"The Mayor banner (🎩 The Mayor / Attached / Activity / Runtime) spans the full width below the header and takes up too much space. On desktop-sized screens it should be integrated into the header nav bar. On smaller screens where the header no longer fits, it should drop down into the main content area. This is a responsive layout change to the control center dashboard.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"trillium@trilliumsmith.com","created_at":"2026-03-02T19:49:06Z","created_by":"mayor","updated_at":"2026-03-02T19:49:06Z"}
